data.romaji: mondai tsugi no bunshou wo yonde ,
1 ・ 2 ・ 3 ・ 4 kara mottomo yoi mono wo ichi tsu erabi nasai .
data.translation: Choose the best one from 1, 2, 3, and 4.

data.romaji: ・ ・ ・ ・ moushikomi tetsuzuki no kanryou nochi ha ,
ichi do o osame itadaita hiyou ( tekisuto dai wo fukumu ) ha o kaeshi dekimasen .
data.translation: Once paid, fees (including textbook fees) cannot be refunded.

data.romaji: hikkoshi ・ nyuuin nado no riyuu ni yoru kyanseru ( ※ 1 ) no baai ha ,
data.translation: In the case of cancellation (*1) due to reasons such as moving or hospitalization,

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence
to be done (to someone or something)

data.romaji: jugyou ga kaishi sareru mae ni sono naiyou wo shoumei suru shorui wo teishutsu shite itadakereba ,
data.translation: If you can submit documents proving the content before the class starts,

data.romaji: hiyou no 10 % no tesuu ryou ( ※ 2 ) wo hiita kingaku wo o kaeshi itashimasu .
data.translation: We will refund the amount minus a 10% handling fee (*2).

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romaji: jugyou ga kaishi sarete kara no kyanseru no baai ha o kaeshi dekimasen no de ,
data.translation: If you cancel after the class has started, we will not be able to refund your refund.

data.romaji: ( ※ 2 ) tesuu ryou : dare ka no tame ni nani ka wo shita toki ni ,
data.translation: (*2) Fee: When you do something for someone,

data.romaji: sono tema ni taishite harawareru o kin

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence
indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romajiQues: kyanseru no baai no henkin ni tsuite , tadashii no ha dore ka .
data.translationQues: Which of the following is correct regarding refunds in case of cancellation?
romajiOption: hikkoshi no baai ha , jugyou kaishi mae ni shoumei shorui wo daseba 90 % kaesu .
hikkoshi no baai ha , jugyou ga hajimatte kara de mo zenbu kaesu .
nyuuin no baai ha , jugyou ga hajimatte kara de mo zenbu kaesu .
nyuuin no baai ha , jugyou kaishi mae ni shoumei shorui wo daseba zenbu kaesu .
translationOption: If you move, 90% of the fee will be refunded if you submit proof of payment before classes start.
If you move, return everything even after classes start.
If you are hospitalized, you will have to return everything even after classes start.
If you are hospitalized, all proof documents will be returned if you submit them before classes start.
